title: Certificate of Establishment
content:
Certificate of Establishment

The founding law of the University was published in the official gazette on March 03, 2011 with the name T.C.ÜSKÜDAR UNIVERSITY. This document is a public declaration of the University's founding purposes, vision, mission, strategic goals, corporate values and quality standards.

Purpose of Establishment

To specialize in the field of behavioral health and sciences, to produce knowledge, projects and academic production at world standards, to develop resources for this production, to realize collaborations and to train qualified people.

Innovation

Being a thematic university in the field of Behavioral Health and Sciences.

Under the doctrine of "A Holistic Approach from Mathematics to Philosophy, Social Sciences to Health Sciences", the vision of producing services, projects and trained personnel for human health, community mental health, individual, family, humanitarian and social values by applying multidisciplinary bioengineering, brain imaging, neuroscience, genetic science, informatics, sociology, psychology, religious science, and communication science methods.

Special R&D (Research and Development) areas:

Neuropsychology,

Neuroinformatics,

Neuromanagement,

Neuroeconomics,

Neurophilosophy

Neurotheology,

Pharmacogenetics,

Technology of Thought.

Values

To be a pioneering and exemplary universal university that respects all human values, adheres to universal law, national laws, universal and scientific values, is open to change and innovation, has environmental sensitivity, focuses on educating students to high standards, and provides added value and participation in regional development. To be a university that does not discriminate on the basis of religion, language, race, nationality, gender, color, clothing, differences in thought, adopts democratic values of criticism, libertarianism, pluralism and participation, protects the fundamental values of society, prioritizes social benefit and is sensitive to social problems, prioritizes scientificity and criticality, prioritizes ethical values, and has the principles of equality, reliability and rationality.

Seeking, collecting, transferring, preserving, researching, producing, sharing and disseminating information, following a method that achieves excellence,

Üsküdar University is a university that prioritizes transparency and accountability in its activities and events, attaches great importance to international relations and strives to be the science center address in Türkiye for Turkish citizens living abroad, supports the process of entry into the European Union without losing the basic values for Türkiye to reach the level of contemporary civilizations.

The core values that ensure the job satisfaction of Üsküdar University Academic and Administrative staff and continuously improve them are the core values of the University.
